patches.hypothesis: Use a more robust method to handle input values and add edge cases
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the convergence failure of the Erf.erf() method when the input value is too large. The method is used to compute the probability of a normal distribution. The issue is the input value is not properly handled. The fix is to add a check for input value and return the appropriate probability when the input value is too large.
